title: primula bracteata subsp. henrici
intro: Primula bracteata subsp. henrici, also known as Henrici primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. Native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Primula bracteata subsp. henrici include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, where it is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
